pattern_label: キャラクター＋Coco（全員参加）
pattern_description: CocoとしらたまAND/ORしずくAND/ORひよりが全24種、Cocoが必ず参加
week_theme: 七夕の夜に星へ届ける言葉
desc_ja: 七夕の願いも夏の暑さも、Cocoと3匹がそのまま言葉にしてくれる。おはようからおやすみまで、恋も仕事もちょっとした気遣いも。毎日使いたくなるCoco参加の夏の24種。
desc_en: Coco and her three companions carry your words through the summer. From morning greetings to birthday wishes, Tanabata nights to quiet goodnights — 24 warm stamps for every moment of connection.

stamps.scene: 夏の朝、カーテン越しの光が差し込む部屋で清々しい挨拶
stamps.send_psychology: 夏の清々しい朝に丁寧な挨拶で相手の一日を明るく始めたい
stamps.outfit: 白い麻のシャツドレス、袖を軽くまくった涼しげなスタイル
stamps.color_scheme: モーニングゴールド・ソフトホワイト・アーリーブルー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, gentle paint bleeding effect, warm and cozy feeling. Morning gold and soft white palette with early summer blue suggesting a fresh July dawn. Sparkling warm eyes, delicate light reflection in pupils, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing a crisp white linen shirt dress with lightly rolled sleeves, elegant yet relaxed morning posture), standing at an open summer window with soft golden morning light filtering through sheer curtains; Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits at Coco's feet looking up with sparkling warm eyes, both front paws raised in a cheerful greeting wave; morning glory vines visible outside the window. Full body view, front-facing composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはようございます』naturally placed at top center, warm morning gold lettering; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 夏の昼間、Cocoがひよりに笑顔でひとこと。七夕前の浮き浮きした雰囲気
stamps.send_psychology: 好きな人や友達を純粋に褒めたい・日常の愛情確認
stamps.outfit: ミントグリーンのブラウス＋白のAラインスカート
stamps.color_scheme: ミントグリーン・クリームホワイト・サニーゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, gentle paint bleeding effect, cheerful and warm feeling. Mint green and cream white palette with sunny gold, evoking a bright summer midday scene. Sparkling warm eyes, delicate light reflection in pupils, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing a mint green blouse and white A-line skirt, posture warmly tilted toward Hiyori); Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches on Coco's outstretched hand, looking up with sparkling warm eyes and a delighted expression; Coco's free hand raised in a gentle admiring gesture; soft summer sunflowers in the background watercolor wash. Three-quarter view.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『今日も可愛いね』naturally placed at top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at top. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

stamps.scene: 花火の夏の夜、Cocoとしらたまの温かな一瞬
stamps.send_psychology: 夏の浮き立つ気持ちと一緒に素直な愛情を伝えたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, gentle paint bleeding effect, warm and romantic summer night feeling. Firework gold and rose pink palette against deep summer night navy, evoking a Japanese summer festival night. Sparkling warm eyes full of love.
[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing a pale pink resort dress, face slightly upturned toward distant fireworks, expression softly joyful and full of warmth); Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) nuzzles against Coco's ankles looking up with sparkling warm loving eyes; watercolor firework bursts in gold and pink scatter across the upper background. Close-front composition.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『大好き』large and warm, naturally placed at center-right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. Large copy space at left. LINE sticker style, warm and lovable character design.

[Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing a white cotton sundress and a straw hat, walking in relaxed posture); Hiyori (gentle white bird) flies alongside at shoulder height with wings spread, turning head toward Coco with bright warm sparkling eyes; both face slightly toward the viewer in a side-front composition; soft green summer trees and sky in the background watercolor wash. [Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing neat beige office-casual outfit, standing with one hand gently raised in a caring wave); Shizuku (small wise turtle with flower decoration on shell) sits beside Coco's feet with front flipper raised slightly; both expressions calm, warm, and caring; doorway light suggests a hot summer noon outside. [Character] Coco (serene refined Japanese woman in her early 40s, sleek bob haircut, wearing a pale purple blouse and cream skirt, leaning chin on one hand with a coolly amused, faintly sardonic half-smile — the most charming 'I see' expression); Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches on the back of Coco's chair, also tilted slightly to one side with a similar 'hmm, interesting' expression; both radiate contained amusement.
